content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services and have built a solid reputation among boat owners who need reliable, knowledgeable hands on their boat — not just a quick fix.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control systems, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you're buying a used vessel and need a pre-purchase survey, dealing with a fouled hull that requires underwater attention, troubleshooting a chiller or marine HVAC system in the heat of summer, or sorting out a head system that's giving you trouble, we've got the experience to get it done right.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, working within a 60-mile radius to reach vessels wherever they're docked or moored. Our customers range from weekend cruisers to liveaboards who depend on their boat day in and day out. At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment — and we treat it that way. Every job gets our full attention, and we don't cut corners on the work that keeps you safe and comfortable on the water.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today.
seoKeywords: boat sanitation system repair South Florida

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey gives you a detailed, objective assessment of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition — essential for pre-purchase decisions, insurance requirements, or simply knowing where your boat stands. We inspect everything from the hull and deck to through-hulls, rigging, and onboard systems, delivering a thorough written report you can actually use.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull cleaning, zinc replacement, prop inspection, line and debris removal, and underwater damage assessment — all without hauling the vessel out of the water. Keeping a clean hull and properly functioning running gear below the waterline directly impacts performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull integrity.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including self-contained units, chilled water systems, and reverse-cycle setups. Proper maintenance of marine HVAC systems prevents refrigerant leaks, compressor failures, and seawater cooling line issues that can leave you sweltering or facing costly repairs mid-season.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work includes head system installation and repair, holding tank service, through-hull fitting replacement, raw water system maintenance, and discharge line troubleshooting. A properly functioning sanitation system is critical for both comfort and compliance with marine environmental regulations, and we make sure everything is sealed, odor-free, and working as it should.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement via underwater diving
Marine air conditioning system repair and seasonal servicing
Head system overhaul and holding tank installation or repair
Underwater prop inspection and entangled line removal
Through-hull fitting replacement and raw water system service
Chilled water marine HVAC installation on cruising or liveaboard vessels
